description_long: This is a square decorative pillow with a soft, fabric exterior featuring a delicate paisley pattern in pastel shades of pink, green, and lavender on a white background. The pillow appears plush and well-stuffed, giving it a voluminous and inviting look. Both the front and back sides display the same intricate paisley design, while the edges are slightly rounded, indicating a full and even filling. There is a visible brand logo in dark color located in the upper left and right corners of the pillow, adding a touch of distinction. The surface fabric has a matte, smooth finish, typical of cotton or a cotton-blend material. No visible tags or care labels are attached to the exterior, and the pillow appears to be in pristine, clean condition.
description: A square, plush decorative pillow with a pastel paisley pattern on a white background and a visible brand logo in the corner. The surface is smooth and matte, and the pillow looks clean and well-stuffed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full paisley pattern and a dark brand logo in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and fullness, with the pattern and logo slightly distorted along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view with the same paisley pattern and a dark brand logo now in the upper right corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pillow's thickness and the logo at the tip, with the pattern mirrored along the edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A dark, stylized logo is visible in the upper left and right corners of the pillow.
